issues.detail: Instructions lack error handling and edge case coverage.
Skill is specific to Next.js and Express, not platform-agnostic.

scenarios.name: Next.js login route with iron-session
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses getIronSession with cookies() from next/headers, sets password from env, configures httpOnly and maxAge 604800, and calls session.save(); baseline references iron-session generically but misses await cookies() pattern and exact maxAge.

scenarios.name: Protect dashboard server component
scenarios.rationale: Treatment calls getIronSession<SessionData>(await cookies(), options), checks isLoggedIn, and uses redirect('/login'); baseline often uses middleware-only checks or omits the typed SessionData and the await on cookies().
